MarkInfos.MarkItemTitle: 38. 请根据提示写一篇关于个人习惯的英语演讲

AnswerInfos.HandwriteInfo:
Hello, everyone, Today, I'll talk about my habit. Healthy is an vital thing in our life, I have an habit "running".
When I running by the lake, I can breath fresh air and see the beautiful scenery, my body will feel really relax. I keep it for 3 years, so it make me very insist. When I meet difficult, I can calm down and make a decision when I can't keep more, I can tell myself "insist", so, this habit is not only good for my body but also good for my mental healthy, That can make my grow up became insist. Let's running! make good self!
Thank you for listening
AnswerInfos.AnswerAnalysis: 这是一篇主题为"我的习惯"的英语演讲习作，文章基本完成了演讲写作要求，清晰点明了跑步的习惯并阐述了该习惯对自己的益处，主题明确符合要求；但存在多处语法和用词错误：1."Healthy"是形容词，此处应该用名词Health作主语；2.冠词使用错误，vital/habit都是辅音音素开头，应该用a而非an；3.When I running缺少谓语动词，应该是When I run；4.breath是名词，此处应该用动词breathe；5.relax是动词/名词，此处形容词放松的应该是relaxed；6.so it make主谓一致错误，it是第三人称单数，应为makes；7.When I meet difficult中difficult是形容词，此处应为名词difficulty；8."make my grow up"my是形容词性物主代词，此处应为宾格me；9."Let's running"let后接动词原形，应为Let's run；整体完成写作任务，存在语法错误，符合习作评分中及格档的完成度
AnswerInfos.RightAnswer:
本题为开放式作文，参考范文如下：
Hello, everyone. Today, I'll talk about my habit. Health is a very vital thing in our life, and I have a good habit—running.
When I run by the lake, I can breathe fresh air and enjoy the beautiful scenery. My body will feel really relaxed. I have kept this habit for 3 years, and it makes me very persistent. When I meet difficulties, I can calm down and make a right decision. When I feel I can't keep going, I can tell myself to insist. So this habit is not only good for my body, but also good for my mental health. It helps me grow up to be a persistent person. Let's keep running and become a better version of ourselves!
Thank you for listening.
